Layout.title: shoutrrr-logger
Layout.description: Notification logging and management for shoutrrr

Index.title: shoutrrr-logger
Index.description: Notification logging and management for shoutrrr services. Sign in to continue.

Admin.noPermission: You do not have permission to access this page.
Admin.title: Administration
Admin.description: Manage users, tokens, plugins, and system settings

auditLog.description: Records of admin actions: user, token, settings, and plugin changes.

monitoring.description: Monitoring tokens grant read-only access to the /api/v1/monitoring/health endpoint. Use them for external systems like Nagios or Icinga2.
monitoring.createDesc: Provide a descriptive name for this token (e.g. "Icinga2 Server").
monitoring.name: Name
monitoring.createdDesc: Copy this token now. You won't be able to see it again!
monitoring.usageDesc: Use this as a Bearer token in the Authorization header when polling /api/v1/monitoring/health.
monitoring.deleteDesc: Are you sure? Any monitoring systems using this token will immediately lose access. This action cannot be undone.

plugins.allowUserConfigsDesc: Allow regular users to configure this plugin with their own private settings.
plugins.dropHint: Drop a plugin folder into backend/plugins/ and restart the application. See PLUGINS.md for the authoring guide.

settings.statsWindowLimit: Cannot exceed Retention period or API metrics retention (when either is non-zero).
settings.smtpConfigDesc: Configure the SMTP server for dispatching email alerts.

tokens.description: Admin-created tokens are global — visible to all users in the log.
tokens.createDesc: Global tokens are visible to all users. The raw value is shown once — store it securely.
tokens.createdDesc: Copy this token now. It will not be shown again.
tokens.usageDesc: Use this as a Bearer token in the Authorization header when sending notifications to /api/v1/shoutrrr.
tokens.editDesc: Update the token name or its ingestion rate limit.
tokens.deleteDesc: The token {name} will be permanently deleted and any services using it will stop working.

users.deleteDesc: This will permanently delete {username} and all their access tokens. This action cannot be undone.

About.title: About
About.appDescription: Receives, stores, and displays notifications forwarded by shoutrrr services.
About.failedToLoad: Failed to load backend version info.
About.apiMismatchSuffix: . The frontend and backend may be out of sync.

ApiPerformance.title: API Performance
ApiPerformance.description: Request latency and error rates across all endpoints
ApiPerformance.noData: No data for this window yet
ApiPerformance.noApiData: No API requests recorded in this window yet. Data appears as traffic comes in.

Alerts.title: Alerts
Alerts.noAlertsDescription: When your alert rules match incoming notifications, they'll appear here.

NotificationLog.advancedSearchDesc: Search specific fields and use regular expressions.
NotificationLog.deleteWarning: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete all matching notifications from the database.
NotificationLog.noNotificationsGroup: No notifications match the selected {field} value(s).
NotificationLog.noNotificationsFilter: No notifications match the current filters.
NotificationLog.searchFailed: Search failed. Check your query syntax.
NotificationLog.selectAllDeletable: Select all deletable notifications on this page

searchHelp.title: Notification Query Language (NQL)
searchHelp.intro: Shoutrrr Logger uses a powerful JQL-like query language for searching your notifications. Combine operators, specific fields, and regular expressions to find exactly what you're looking for.
searchHelp.booleanDesc: Combine multiple clauses using AND, OR, and NOT (or -). You can also use parentheses () to group clauses.
searchHelp.noFieldNote: If no field is specified, the search applies globally across titles, messages, and senders.
searchHelp.partialDesc: Matches any part of the field, case-insensitive.
searchHelp.exactDesc: Must match the entire field exactly.

PluginProfile.name: Name
PluginProfile.deleteDesc: The profile's configuration and routing rules are permanently removed. Notifications will no longer be delivered through it.
PluginProfile.limitReached: Profile limit reached ({maxProfiles} per plugin). Ask an administrator to raise it.
PluginProfile.copySettings: Copy settings and rules from the current profile

UserPlugins.externalDisabled: External delivery is disabled by your administrator — your plugins won't forward notifications sent with your private tokens until it's re-enabled.

RoutingRules.title: Outbound Routing Rules
RoutingRules.description: Define routing rules for this plugin. If multiple are defined, a notification matching ANY of them will be dispatched. If NO rules are defined, ALL notifications will be dispatched (plugin catches everything).
RoutingRules.noRules: No routing rules defined. The plugin will receive all notifications by default.

RoutingRuleDialog.noMatches: No recent notifications match this rule.

RoutingRuleTest.testDesc: This will evaluate the rule against recent notifications in the database to see what matches. The number of matches returned is limited by server configuration (default 10).
RoutingRuleTest.noMatches: No recent notifications match this rule.

TokenDeliveryToggles.allowPluginsDesc: Let plugins (Slack, Splunk, webhooks…) forward this token's notifications to third-party services.
TokenDeliveryToggles.allowEmailDesc: Let matching alert rules email this token's notifications. In-app alerts are unaffected.

TokenTestDialog.copyDesc: Copy any of the examples below to send a test notification.
TokenTestDialog.replaceDesc: Replace YOUR_TOKEN with the token's raw value, then run one of the examples below.

MonitoringTokenTest.testDesc: Copy one of the snippets below to verify your monitoring configuration. Because monitoring tokens only have read access, executing these snippets will simply return system metrics and will not alter data.

PreferencesDialog.themeDesc: Choose how shoutrrr-logger looks. "System" follows your operating system setting.
PreferencesDialog.timeFormatDesc: Override how timestamps are displayed. "Auto" uses your browser's language setting.
PreferencesDialog.localStoreNotice: Preferences are stored locally in your browser and are not synced between devices.
PreferencesDialog.labelRulesDesc: Rules are applied in order. A notification can match multiple labels.
PreferencesDialog.noLabelRules: No label rules yet. Add one to start classifying notifications.
PreferencesDialog.excludeOn: Exclude mode on — matching messages are hidden
PreferencesDialog.excludeOff: Exclude mode off — click to hide matching messages
PreferencesDialog.name: Name
PreferencesDialog.regexPatternsDesc: Regex patterns — any match applies this label. Use (?i) prefix for case-insensitive.
PreferencesDialog.alertRulesDesc: Define which notifications should trigger a visual alert.
PreferencesDialog.noAlertRules: No alert rules defined. Add one to receive notifications.
PreferencesDialog.sendTestEmailTitle: Send test email with this notification
PreferencesDialog.tokenCreated: Token created — copy it now, it will not be shown again.
PreferencesDialog.deleteWarning: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete your token.
PreferencesDialog.testEmailSuccess: Test email sent via SMTP successfully!
PreferencesDialog.externalDeliveryWarningAlerts: External delivery is disabled by your administrator — rules with “Send email alert” enabled will still create in-app alerts, but no emails are sent for notifications from your private tokens until it's re-enabled.
PreferencesDialog.externalDeliveryWarningTokens: External delivery is disabled by your administrator — notifications sent with your personal tokens won't be forwarded to plugins or emailed until it's re-enabled.
PreferencesDialog.externalDeliveryWarningToggles: External delivery is disabled by your administrator — these toggles have no effect until it's re-enabled.
